correct_feedback: Yes! Right after Bear got hungry, he looked up in the tree. Great listening!
incorrect_feedback: Hmm, think about what Bear did first when he got hungry, before he ate anything. Take another listen!
reveal_feedback: That one was tricky! Right after Bear got hungry, he looked up in the tree for honey. Now you know!

correct_feedback: Exactly! Frog hopped on the lily pad to reach the other side of the pond. Nice thinking!
incorrect_feedback: Almost! Where in the story was Frog trying to go? Listen for the place he wanted to reach.
reveal_feedback: Tricky one! Frog hopped on the lily pad to get to the other side of the pond. Now you've got it!

correct_feedback: You got it! Mia's problem was that she forgot her lunch at home.
incorrect_feedback: Good try! A problem is something that goes wrong. What happened to Mia's lunch?
reveal_feedback: Let's see together — Mia's problem was that she forgot her lunch at home. Now you know the problem!

correct_feedback: Way to go! Turtle won by keeping on walking while Rabbit napped. Slow and steady!
incorrect_feedback: Not yet — think about what Turtle kept doing the whole time Rabbit was napping.
reveal_feedback: Here's the answer — Turtle won because he kept walking the whole time Rabbit napped. Slow and steady!

correct_feedback: That's it! Just before the red flower opened, two leaves grew. You put it in order!
incorrect_feedback: Close one! What was the very last thing that happened right before the flower opened?
reveal_feedback: Let's look together — just before the flower opened, two leaves grew. Now you've got the order!

correct_feedback: Nice work! The whole story is about Sam looking for his lost hat. You found the big idea!
incorrect_feedback: Take another look. What did Sam do again and again in the story? That's the big idea.
reveal_feedback: Here it is — the story is mostly about Sam looking for his lost hat. Now you know the big idea!

correct_feedback: Yes! Ben and his dog got wet because the rain fell on them at the park.
incorrect_feedback: Hmm, what happened at the park that would get them all wet?
reveal_feedback: Let's see — Ben and his dog got wet because the rain fell on them at the park. Now you know!

correct_feedback: Perfect! Right after Tom got on the bus, he sat down by the window. You got the order right!
incorrect_feedback: Almost! What did Tom do first, right after he stepped onto the bus?
reveal_feedback: Here's the answer — right after Tom got on the bus, he sat down by the window. Now you've got the order!

correct_feedback: You did it! Lily cried because her tall block tower came crashing down.
incorrect_feedback: Good try! Something happened to the tower Lily was so proud of. What made her sad?
reveal_feedback: Tricky one! Lily cried because her tall block tower came crashing down. Now you know why!
